channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-22T06:19Z — 827 outages, 31,090 customers, 383 fair-weather, 5 DC-proximate
item.description: OH-AEP: 1500 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | VA-DOM: 1322 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VA-DOM: 1320 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VA-DOM: 1231 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VA-DOM: 1054 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER)

item.title: Weekly digest — week ending 2026-07-19: 8322 outages, 41.9% fair-weather
